side_effects.description: Dropped blood pressure significantly in father at 1mg daily dose; father had to stop blood pressure medications for a few days to a week. No such effect reported in commenter.

protocol_notes: Escalation protocol: Started at 0.25mg daily split am/pm, after ~1 month increased to 0.5mg split. Current dose 1mg daily. Recommends 7-week cycle followed by 1-month off, repeat if needed. Uses same injection site in shoulder (does not rotate). Added TB-500 as beneficial adjunct.
